title: Fungal Hyphae Reorganize Condensation Fields as Distributed Hygroscopic Sinks
description: Analysis code, processed data, and figure generation scripts for: Fungal Hyphae Reorganize Condensation Fields as Distributed Hygroscopic Sinks. Includes hydrogel calibration experiments (20 trials), fungal tracking pipelines (15 trials), wheat stripe rust (RSR) leaf condensation analysis (6 leaves), and Kaplan-Meier survival analysis of droplet lifetimes.
notes: Raw microscopy images and ilastik probability maps are archived on Zenodo (DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19167978). Processed CSVs sufficient to reproduce all figures are included in this repository.
